policies.outbound:
<set-variable name="resp_text" value="@(((string)context.Response.Body.As(true)
                    .SelectToken("choices[0].text") ?? string.Empty)
                .TrimEnd((char)13,(char)10))" />
        
            
                
                    application/json; charset=utf-8
                
                @{
                    var output = (string)context.Variables["resp_text"];
                    return new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject(
                        new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("statusCode", 200),
                        new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("outputs", output)
                    ).ToString();
                }
